subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the luminous horizon! Thanksgiving is the attribute of the righteous, and praise is the characteristic of the denizens of heaven. Therefore, in gratitude for His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بمنظر انور شکر صفت راستانست و حمد سمت بندگان آسمان پس تو بشکرانه لطف
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
